A [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Muun''' was captured after the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. He provided a code to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in order to see [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] transmissions sent to [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray's]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Mechno-chair/Legends|mechno-chair's]] [[Holotransmitter/Legends|holotransceiver]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Leland Chee]] has said it was the intent for the Muun mentioned in ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' to be one of the Muuns seen in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', but without a name in either source, it's unknown which Muun it is.<ref>{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=980#15912108|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-11-10|time=2:28 PM}}</ref>
